title: प्रत्ययः (Pratyaya)
desc: The massive domain governing the introduction of all affixes.

title: अङ्गस्य (Aṅgasya)
desc: Operations performed on a base (aṅga) when followed by an affix.

title: कारक (Kāraka)
desc: Rules governing syntactic roles in a sentence.

title: समासः (Samāsa)
desc: The domain of compound word formation.
